reviewNote: Four non-actionable Gantt toolbar counters and the retired shift-master assignment matrix chip were intentionally removed; the remaining shared status-token adoption is still protected.

tokenizedPatterns.reason: legacy generic status class is styled through styles/ui/status.css
legacy deadline badge is classified as a status alias outside Gantt
master marker uses neutral status tokens
director order chip tones use neutral/warning/danger status tokens
specification structure chips use neutral/info/warning/success status tokens
specification icon badges use status and semantic surface tokens
route type badges use status and semantic surface tokens
route step order badge fallbacks point to MES UI tokens
shift work orders grouping status uses shared muted text token
